text: Today, my little one-person business crossed $10M in total revenue. It took 2,119 days, I ran zero ads & I operate at a ~89% margin. Here are the 23 steps of my wild & strange journey: Hope they are helpful to someone ↓
author: thejustinwelsh

text: Things I know at 41, I wish I had known at 21. ![Image 15: 🧵](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f9f5.svg)
author: thejustinwelsh

text: I’ve done $2M in income in 2.5 years as a solopreneur. And I didn't write a single line of code. My 14 "must use" no-code tools: [![Image 17: 🧵](https://abs.twimg.com/emoji/v2/svg/1f9f5.svg) thread]
author: thejustinwelsh

text: Make a habit of reaching out to people when you don't need something.
author: thejustinwelsh

text: I paid a guy $130 to move a treadmill in 30 minutes. Said he had 8 moves that day. Do the math. Have you made $1,040 in one day? Everyone wants entrepreneurship to be fancy. Sometimes it's just movin' treadmills.
author: thejustinwelsh

text: Today I turn 42. Here's every unique lesson someone taught me in my 20-year career: 1. Don't fuck around in your 20s.
author: thejustinwelsh

text: “Cha-ching” $5,000 hit my PayPal account. “This has to be a typo...” I thought to myself. So I messaged him. “Hey, did you mean to send $5,000?” His response: “Yeah, is that enough?” And just like that, Ghostwriting completely changed my life trajectory. Here’s the story

text: Panic led to lockdowns. Lockdowns led to fiscal stimulus. Stimulus led to inflation. Inflation led to monetary tightening. Tightening leads to recession. The panic wasn’t free - and the bill is coming due.
author: naval

text: I wrote a second book. A short and philosophical take on money and discovering your life's work. I made it free because this is one of those things I just want in as many hands as possible. The paperback is not free for clear reasons. Links below to read:
author: thedankoe

text: Go on more walks. Walk for no reason. Walk to solve a problem. Walk to blow off steam. Walk to get outside. Walk to listen, read, and learn. Walk to escape distractions. Walk to improve your health. Walk to think. A simple walking habit can change absolutely everything.
author: thedankoe

text: Normalize not having an opinion on things you don’t understand.

text: Bitcoin is an exit from the Fed. DeFi is an exit from Wall Street. Social media is an exit from mass media. Homeschooling is an exit from industrial education. Remote work is an exit from 9-5. Creator economy is an exit from employment. Individuals are leaving institutions.

text: * [![Image 15: user avatar](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1645163605166379011/Wu8UcUGU_normal.jpg)](https://x.com/dickiebush) [Dickie Bush 🚢](https://x.com/dickiebush) [@dickiebush](https://x.com/dickiebush) [Sep 22, 2022](https://x.com/dickiebush/status/1572970423935008769) The single most powerful habit for personal growth: Journaling.
